footer.description: ECAA serves Ethiopians and Ethiopian-Americans in the Atlanta area by building intergenerational connections, strengthening community resilience, supporting cultural preservation, and connecting community members to programs, services, and opportunities.

closingNote: Reach ECAA by email, phone, or visit during office hours. ECAA welcomes questions about membership, programs, events, leadership, and community support.
